conditions: Lyriel saves Blue and the others from the dungeon monster; in nine years Blue must take her to the Guardian of the Tree of Life.
consequences: If Blue fails the oath, the contract may consume his life or sever Lyriel's link to the world.
description: Core fairy contract that binds Blue's growth and long-term quest to the Guardian of the Tree of Life.

conditions: Elaria offers herself to the Elf King to save Rurik's life; Rurik must live on and take care of their children.
consequences: If Rurik breaks the promise and throws his life away, Elaria dies by the power of the oath.
description: Tragic life oath that keeps Rurik from going on a suicidal rescue and anchors the family drama.
